title: A Lover's Journey
content:
When a lover hies abroad
Looking for his love,
Azrael smiling sheathes his sword,
Heaven smiles above.
Earth and sea
His servants be,
And to lesser compass round,
That his love be sooner found!
meaning:
Rudyard Kipling's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Lover's Journey"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
